text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheyyy! ☆ From a small town festival, we go
straight into what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom, boom!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Totally fire fireworks! ☆ Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Awww yeah! Up for a run, girlypop?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You know it, Palmster! ☆ Run with the peeps you
love, and you'll never get tired! ♪ Straight up!

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Ready, set... WAHEEEY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios race into the
summer, laughing happily together in harmony.
They spend every day having an absolute blast.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Awww man, camp's over? Already?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Welp, there goes our summer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Man, I was hoping to get a bit more running in.
Well, actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What I really wanted was to spend the summer
with you forever, bestie—just us, racin' toward the
same goal.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that'd be nice. We'd totally give off all the
"running into the sunset" vibes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But hey, things are really gonna start heating up
from here on out. That's way more exciting than
being stuck in eternal summer, amirite?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you are! Let's hype up the autumn Tenno
Sho together! ♪ Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nearby, a single figure watches the two as they
cheer and laugh among themselves.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, apologies. I was merely curious about what
they were talking about while running...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Specifically about how you'll never get tired if
you run with people you like.
choice_data_list: That's the part you're hung up on?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It would be wonderful if that theory of theirs
were true. However, it cannot be so.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
One's running is inevitably affected by the limits
of one's mental and physical capacities.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No. Her running continues to improve, so there is
no cause for concern.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...For Palmer, anyway.
